retrieved_result: BodyPump Body Pump By WLR's Site Manager, Laurence Beeken Tweet Body Pump is a new and exciting way to introduce fitness and exercise into people’s lives, and exercise classes are popping up everywhere. One of the current fitness workouts is Body Pump. Although started originally in New Zealand by Les Mills
